- Action model: UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT move the player through the maze.

end of world model.

- Cols 13-37: mostly black (with player blue at cols 14-19 initially, now at 20-24)
- Cols 38-41: R/R/B/B pattern (red bar area)
- Cols 42-50: white
The player can move through the black area at rows 8-13. To get past the white corridor at rows 14-18, cols 20-24, the player needs to:
1. Move RIGHT to cols 25-31 (the black gap between white corridors)
2. Then move DOWN through rows 14-18

Actually, let me reconsider the player's movement. When the player moved RIGHT from [8,14]-[12,18] to [8,20]-[12,24], it moved 6 cells. So each action moves the player by 6 cells.

Then I need to continue DOWN. At rows 19-25, the black area is cols 13-31. So the player at cols 26-30 would be in the black area. Good.
